script: RT=$(az keyvault secret show --vault-name SDN-YooVault --name yoomd-graph-refresh-token --query value -o tsv); TOKEN=$(curl -s -X POST 'https://login.microsoftonline.com/organizations/oauth2/v2.0/token' -d 'client_id=14d82eec-204b-4c2f-b7e8-296a70dab67e' -d 'grant_type=refresh_token' -d "refresh_token=$RT" -d 'scope=AppCatalog.ReadWrite.All TeamsAppInstallation.ReadWriteForUser.All TeamsAppInstallation.ReadWriteForChat Chat.ReadWrite offline_access' | python3 -c 'import json,sys;print(json.load(sys.stdin)["access_token"])'); echo '=== A. Refresh catalog list, see if today entries appeared ==='; curl -s "https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/appCatalogs/teamsApps?\$filter=distributionMethod%20eq%20%27organization%27&\$expand=appDefinitions" -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" > /tmp/cat-$$.json; python3 -c "import json; d=json.load(open('/tmp/cat-$$.json')); v=d.get('value',[]); print('total:',len(v)); [print('  '+repr(a.get('displayName',''))+' / '+a['id']+' / '+str([x.get('publishingState') for x in a.get('appDefinitions',[])])) for a in v if any(k in a.get('displayName','') for k in ['Jose','Axel','Lia','Afrah'])]"; echo; YOO_AAD='e0d48eb4-1eb3-4263-a72e-f6ad4ef32238'; for tuple in 'Jose:f1cff123-735c-43a8-9e78-b26d4735ffb7:50d6b84e-9e90-4e61-bea2-e961a37585d8' 'Axel:f19c9082-be60-4704-91ed-9154a4e0bd17:6e404205-7c22-4fc2-8148-317930afd26b' 'Lia:80da67bd-640a-4b9e-a5e2-884be6807bce:28021e9a-ff9d-4663-ad68-1408546cd4bc'; do NAME=${tuple%%:*}; REST=${tuple#*:}; AAD=${REST%%:*}; CAT=${REST#*:}; echo "=== Chat install: $NAME Claude => Yoo-$NAME chat ==="; CHAT=$(curl -s -X POST 'https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/chats' -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d "{\"chatType\":\"oneOnOne\",\"members\":[{\"@odata.type\":\"#microsoft.graph.aadUserConversationMember\",\"roles\":[\"owner\"],\"user@odata.bind\":\"https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/users('$YOO_AAD')\"},{\"@odata.type\":\"#microsoft.graph.aadUserConversationMember\",\"roles\":[\"owner\"],\"user@odata.bind\":\"https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/users('$AAD')\"}]}" | python3 -c 'import json,sys; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get("id",""))' 2>/dev/null); echo "  chat=${CHAT:0:30}..."; if [ -n "$CHAT" ]; then CODE=$(curl -s -o /tmp/r-$$ -w '%{http_code}' -X POST "https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/chats/$CHAT/installedApps" -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d "{\"teamsApp@odata.bind\":\"https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/appCatalogs/teamsApps/$CAT\"}"); echo "  install -> $CODE"; [ "$CODE" != "201" ] && [ "$CODE" != "200" ] && head -c 250 /tmp/r-$$; echo; rm -f /tmp/r-$$; fi; done
